sections.paragraph:
ὑπόλειμμα (not ὑπόλιμμα, as W-H. spell it; see W-H. App. 154), ατος, τό (Hippocr., Aristot. et al.; PSI 860, 8 [III b.c.]; LXX) a relatively small surviving group, remnant Ro 9:27 (v.l. κατάλειμμα.)—DELG s.v. λείπω. M-M.

W-H. W-H. = BWestcott/FHort—List 1, beg.

Hippocr Hippocr = Corpus Hippocraticum, V–IV b.c.—List 5

Aristot Aristot , various works, IV b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

PSI PSI = Papiri greci e latini: Pubblicazioni della Società Italiana—List 4

LXX LXX = Septuaginta, ed. ARahlfs, unless otherwise specified—Lists 2, beg.

v.l. v.l. = varia lectio (variant reading)

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 1038
